overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character running along a street median in Night City during dusk. The scene features towering skyscrapers with massive neon billboards, an overpass with advertisements, and futuristic vehicles passing by on both sides.

events.description: passing under the concrete overpass structure with illuminated advertisements

agents.ego_description: sprinting along the street median toward the overpass, passing concrete planter boxes

notable_agents.action: futuristic sports car driving past on the right side of the road

entered.detail: tall dark skyscraper with illuminated Militech corporate logo near the top
large red digital billboard displaying a glowing cyan skull logo
elevated highway overpass covered with multiple digital advertising screens
tall building with vertical neon signage reading TSUNAMI and other advertisements
rectangular concrete planter box with small green bushes and debris

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view down a wide multi-lane street in a futuristic city, with the camera moving rapidly along the center median. The Militech tower looms on the right while an overpass with bright billboards approaches ahead. The player passes under the overpass structure around the 8-second mark as vehicles speed past on either side.

scene_state.functional_zone: open street median with distinctive red foliage tree

agents.ego_description: continuing along the median, navigating around a large tree with red leaves while maintaining forward momentum

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving on the left side of the road, moving in the same direction

entered.detail: large mature tree with distinctive crimson red foliage growing from the median
large advertisement displaying a muscular figure with BOTTLE UP text visible

segments.scene_description: Having passed the overpass, the scene opens up to reveal more of the darkening sky. The camera passes a striking red-leaved tree growing from the median, which becomes the central focal point. Various neon billboards line both sides of the street as the player continues moving forward through the futuristic urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: street median with utility access cover

events.description: camera slows and tilts downward to focus on a manhole cover on the median

agents.ego_description: slowing to a stop and looking down at a manhole cover, examining the ground detail

entered.detail: circular red metal manhole cover with white geometric design embedded in the concrete median

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the camera slows significantly and tilts downward to focus on a red manhole cover embedded in the concrete median. The surrounding area shows patches of grass and debris. The perspective remains focused on the ground level detail as the video concludes, with distant billboards still visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a rapid first-person movement through a neon-lit urban canyon that transitions from a high-speed traversal of a futuristic thoroughfare to a static, detailed focus on the ground. It begins with a fast-paced glide along a wide center median, passing the looming Militech tower before moving directly under a massive overpass adorned with bright billboards. As the camera emerges from beneath the structure, the view opens up to a darkening sky and shifts focus toward a striking red-leaved tree growing from the concrete. The scene then continues past a corridor of glowing neon advertisements before the forward momentum slows significantly. Finally, the camera tilts downward, shifting its perspective from the towering skyline to a close-up of a red manhole cover embedded in the debris-strewn median.
